post.subject: Oops
post.body: Dad caught me smokin outside my granny's house on sunday! He was up the drive way and i was with rach on the street. He called me just as i had the cigarette in my mouth and he saw it. I walked up to him and he gave me a really angry look and said, "Don't ever let me catch you doing that again!" I doubt he will tell my mum and hopefully wont mention it again.
